trivia: The Citation Excel answered a simple wish: a midsize cabin you can stand up in, on light-jet economics. Cessna shortened the Citation X fuselage, added the straight wing, and created one of the best-selling business jets in history.
Over a thousand Excels, XLSs, and XLS+s are flying, and charter fleets adore them. If a business jet crosses your station on a weekday morning, odds are decent it squawks C56X.
funFacts: First flight: February 29, 1996, a leap-day debut.
1,000+ built across Excel, XLS, and XLS+.
Among the most chartered business jets in the world.
